title: dysoxylum costulatum
intro: Dysoxylum costulatum, also known as the Burmese Dysoxylum or costate Dysoxylum, is a species of plant in the family Meliaceae, commonly found in Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Dysoxylum costulatum include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its use in treating digestive issues and skin conditions. Dysoxylum costulatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
